title: Marbella Stag Do Boat Rental Costs, Tips and Choices for 2026
html:
Planning a stag do in Marbella? Renting a boat from Puerto Banús gives you a private party on the Mediterranean for as little as EUR 400 for a half-day shared tour or up to EUR 3,500 for a crewed luxury yacht. BoatHire24 connects you with verified listings for stag groups throughout 2026.

Where to set off in Marbella for your stag do

The best departure points are Puerto Banús, Marbella Marina, Cabopino Port, and Estepona Marina. Puerto Banús is the most popular for stag groups, with its glamorous bars and easy access to the Mediterranean. Marbella Marina offers a quieter start, while Cabopino Port sits near the protected dunes of Artola. Estepona Marina, 15 minutes west, is a great alternative with ample parking and a scenic promenade. For longer trips, head towards the Bay of Gibraltar or anchor off the coast near Sotogrande. You can day charters in Marbella for your chosen dates.

Which boat to rent for a stag group

Choose a boat based on group size, party style, and budget. Here is a rundown of the best options for stag dos in Marbella.

  1. Motor yacht (8, 12 guests), ideal for comfort and style, with a flybridge for sunbathing; from EUR 1,500 half-day.
  2. Rib or speedboat (6, 8 guests), perfect for adrenaline and thrill-seeking; from EUR 600 half-day.
  3. Catamaran (12, 20 guests), stable and spacious, with a large deck for partying; from EUR 2,000 half-day.
  4. Sailboat (6, 10 guests), a more relaxed experience with a chance to take the helm; from EUR 800 half-day.
  5. Gulet (10, 20 guests), traditional wooden boat with cabins, ideal for overnight trips; from EUR 2,500 full-day.

For a top-tier option, check the Azimut 58 charter page for a 58-foot motor yacht that accommodates 12 people and comes with a crew and water toys. One option worth a look is the Azimut 58 charter page.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Marbella for a stag do?

Prices vary by boat type, duration, and season, with half-day trips starting at EUR 400 for a shared tour. Here is a typical price breakdown for 2026.

  • Shared tour on a motorboat: from EUR 80 per person, usually 4 hours.
  • Small motorboat half-day (6 people): from EUR 600, includes skipper.
  • Catamaran full-day (12, 18 guests): from EUR 2,500, with crew and lunch.
  • Crewed luxury yacht full-day (12 guests): from EUR 3,500, includes drinks and water toys.

For a wide selection of vessels and instant booking, browse day charters in Marbella on the BoatHire24 platform. You can also see more on the BoatHire24 marketplace.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Marbella?

For most stag charters you do not need a licence because the boat comes with a professional skipper. Spanish law requires a licence for unskippered rentals over a certain engine power, but every boat on BoatHire24 for stag dos includes a crew as standard. Operators confirm exact requirements at booking. If you want to drive yourself, you will need a valid ICC (International Certificate of Competence) or a Spanish Patrón de Embarcaciones de Recreo licence.

For the best weather and party atmosphere, book between June and September when the Levante wind is less frequent and the sea is calm near Marbella.

At a glance: Marbella stag do boat rental

  • Price range: EUR 80, 3,500 per group
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Trip length: 4 hours to full-day or overnight
  • Guest capacity: up to 20 on catamarans
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Marbella for a stag do

Can we bring our own food and drink on a charter?

Most operators allow you to bring your own provisions, but many offer catering packages that include Spanish meats, seafood and an open bar.

How far can we go from Marbella in a half-day charter?

A half-day trip typically covers 15 to 20 nautical miles, taking you as far as the coast of Estepona or across to the African coast near Ceuta on a clear day.

What happens if the weather is bad on our stag day?

Charter companies monitor forecasts closely; if winds exceed 25 knots or a storm is forecast, they will offer a full refund or reschedule.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Marbella and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
